target_skill.name: email-craft
target_skill.description: Draft emails Baylee will send — "write an email to", "draft a message", "respond to", or confirming Claude's suggestion to email. Not for pitch docs (→ pitch-crafter) or Slack.

competing_skills.name: pitch-crafter
competing_skills.description: Persuasive pitch docs — "one-pager", "cold email pitch", "landing page", "elevator pitch". Not for plain emails (→ email-craft), slide decks, building (→ build), or scoring (→ idea-scout).

competing_skills.name: assign-work
competing_skills.description: Generate action items for Baylee's hands — dashboard clicks, device actions, env setup, things Claude can't do directly. Not for tasks Claude can do or task tracking (→ add-to-do, grove).

competing_skills.name: add-to-do
competing_skills.description: Task capture and triage — "add to do", "remind me to", "show my to-dos", "done with X", "drop X". Not for idea capture (→ grove) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: grove
competing_skills.description: Grove operations — "save this idea", "grove this idea", "what's in grove", "recent activity", browse ideas. Not for to-do capture (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

positive_cases: Write an email to my realtor asking about the Maple Ave listing's HOA fees
Draft a message to David — I need to push the standup to Thursday this week
Respond to that note from Mom about Thanksgiving dates
Yeah, draft that email to the vendor about the invoice mistake
negative_cases: Write a one-pager pitching Listing Lens to investors — full persuasive treatment
Remind me to email Sarah tomorrow about the contract
Slack David about the standup change — quick message in #team
Add to my to-do: send the wedding RSVP by Friday
Landing page copy for the Grove pitch — make it persuasive
